text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... Oh no... Um... Fukukitaru? Guys?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wheeze! Wheeze! Cough... Su... Suzuka... You're going too faaast!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant... Keep zoning out like that and we'll wind up too far out to make it back in time for class again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That wouldn't be good... Air Groove said if I'm late for the same
reason two more times, she might ban me from early-morning runs...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so that's why she asked us to keep an eye on you... Can't say it
feels like we're doing a good job, though.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, why don't we catch our breaths and hydrate? Then we can
turn around and head back to the academy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Already? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Do we have to?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, didn't you yourself just say that you're on thin ice? Two more
strikes and the vice president will give you a scolding that could make
a demon cry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's going a little too far. How about we just don't make her
mad in the first place?

text_block_list.name: Suzuka and Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup, hup... Oh! Hello, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright?! Wait, how long have you been following us?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I decided to go for a run and just happened to see you all when I got
outside. So... the whole time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, you don't say! In that case, would you like to run with us on the
way back?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Thank you kindly for the invitation! ♪ But please don't mind me,
I'm just doing my own thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I like to take my time, so you all go on back at your own pace.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well... okay. We'll go on ahead, then. Come on, you two. See you
later, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Until then! ♪ ...Oh, what's this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Oh my, are the cherry blossoms budding already? The winter sakura,
perhaps? I can hear the first faint footsteps of spring approaching.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I may be a bit of a late bloomer, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Until my spring comes, I'll continue running nice and easy. ♪ Hup,
hup, hup...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe and Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...We've hit our target distance. Let's take a rest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
...!
Okay!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Whew... The morning air feels so nice! I feel so sharp and focused.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Uh, Ayabe? Is something wrong with my legs?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...No, I was just thinking about how bold and flashy your form is.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! Um, thank you! Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But your turn around that last curve was a little too wide. You should
learn to narrow your stride a little more sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oooh... Yeah, you're right. I know that's what I should be doing, but
it's hard for me to make small adjustments in the moment.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but still, thank you for the advice! You've got such a great eye for
details like that, so I really appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? I just don't want you to trip, so I thought I'd say something...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Wait... hm? Do you hear that? It sounds like somebody's... singing.
Their voice sounds familiar.
Dooo, la-la, la-laaa... ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Top Road, we should leave. Now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Mark those two passing over yonder! The twin bearers of my fate
have appeared!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: You! H-how'd you get here so fast, Opera O?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe and Top Road! W-would you two, er, like to join the, uh,
t-triumphant return of the morning dew?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The what?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Just a trifle off, my dear Doto! She meant to say,
"Come partake in the triumphant return of the divine Overlord, who
sparkles like the morning dew!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Uhh, so... you're inviting us to a morning run along the riverbank... or
something?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A summarily summarized summary! Exactly so! Come now, don't be
shy—join our merry troupe!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Okay! Sounds fun! Thanks, Opera O! You too, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Um, hold on... Are you serious?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You just told me I should learn to be more nimble, so a rougher
surface would make for great practice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I'm always looking to test my mettle against Opera O and Doto!
I can't let an opportunity like this get away from me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And that is what makes you an architect of the age of the Overlord.
Come, let us fly! Haaah ha ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, fine!
